## What does this PR add or change?

<!-- e.g. "Add FooBar MCP server to Popular MCP Servers" -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The resource is directly about Claude or has first-class Claude/Anthropic support.
- [ ] The link is a working HTTPS URL pointing to the canonical source.
- [ ] It follows the format: `- [Name](https://url) - Short factual description.` (space-hyphen-space separator, capitalized, ends with a period).
- [ ] The description is neutral and factual (no marketing, no star counts).
- [ ] It's placed in the most fitting section (and the Contents is updated if I added a new one).
- [ ] It isn't already listed, and the link isn't a duplicate of an existing one.
- [ ] `npx awesome-lint` passes with no errors.
